scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "tsx watch backend/src/server.ts" "vite frontend --config frontend/vite.config.ts --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.build: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p backend/tsconfig.json && tsc -b frontend/tsconfig.json && vite build frontend --config frontend/vite.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p backend/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -b frontend/tsconfig.json
